case_title: TIMOTHY, ALVENA (RESPONDENT) vs. JONES, SUSAN, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA

docket_entries.description: JUDGE DIANE WICK, BETH WILBER-CLERK, BRENDA FIELDS-REPORTER: C/C FOR CT. TRIAL. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT SUSAN JONES.
